subcodes.first_line: O thou who art advancing into the Kingdom of God! Verily, I read thy eloquent letter... Know verily that Abdu'l-Baha has spiritual speech, heavenly conversations
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
